title: asplenium arnottii
intro: Asplenium arnottii, also known as Arnott's spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Asplenium arnottii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including tinctures and decoctions.
